title: eID API
excerpt: eid, api, integrators, features, provided, allow, use, systems, party
autoSummary: Eid API is provided to allow third party integrators to use eid features in their systems.eid is an open source programming language.

title: Signing Apps
excerpt: apps, signing, desktop, stamping, documents, mobile, electronic, using, allow, used
autoSummary: The desktop and mobile signing apps are used to allow using the electronic id for signing and stamping documents. The apps are available on iOS and Android.

title: Kosovo Wallet
excerpt: wallet, kosovo, app, credentials, seal, safely, mobile, electronic, used
autoSummary: Kosovo wallet is a mobile app used to safely keep the credentials of the electronic id or electronic seal. It is available for iOS and Android devices.

title: Get eID
excerpt: eid, enrollment, arbk, arc, passing, digital, electronic, getting, process, involves
autoSummary: Getting eid involves passing the enrollment process at arc (for the electronic id) or at arbk ( for the digital seal).

title: Introduction
excerpt: eid, kosovo, authenticate, ebanking, certificate, api, enrollment, digitally, wallet, database
autoSummary: Kosovo eid is the national system that manages electronic identities. An electronic id is a free digital certificate issued by the government of kosovo, valid for 2 years. With it, citizens can securely sign (or stamp) documents online.

title: Manage eID
excerpt: certificate, portal, service, self, manage, used, cycle, life
autoSummary: The self service portal can be used to manage the life cycle of the certificate. The certificate can also be managed by the user via the website.
